name: Giant's Reign
acquisitionSource: Clear Psyche Deepdive: The Fall of Giant
descriptionTemplate: Gain 1 Arithmetica and gain [Arg1] {STR}. Grant a chosen Awakener [Arg2] Aliemus. If your Tentacle Stance is {Raging Waves}, gain +15% Temporary Crit. Rate & Crit. DMG instead of granting Aliemus.
lore:
The way of the conqueror is to never give up, to never admit defeat.

Even if the horizon has devoured the light, he will still lift the unquenchable sun with brawn.
